Best interrupting I've ever seen.  Never realized that when you hesitate then interrupt, people can tell you've spent precious microseconds letting The Irk grow.  

They're pre-emptively bracing for resentment.

>Trials and tribulations to fix that problem.
>That problem was not the underlying problem.
